name: Large Seagrass Table Lamp (Includes LED Light Bulb) Natural - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Bring a little extra light to your decor with the Large Seagrass Table Lamp from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This elegant table lamp features a woven seagrass design that brings classic charm to any tabletop. It sports a clean white lampshade that brings a bright touch to your room, while the warm glow from the light is great for creating a cozy atmosphere. It works with most standard lightbulbs and has a five-foot cord that you can simply plug into the wall. Whether you’re adding a fresh accent to your living room or looking to add some light next to your reading chair, this seagrass lamp is sure to brighten any space.

Meet Shea McGee, the designer and stylist behind the brand Studio McGee. Founded alongside her husband, Syd, the studio is known for Shea’s design of beautifully elevated spaces that encourage clients to surround themselves with the things and people they love. Now she’s partnering with Threshold to offer Studio McGee’s classic design in a new collection for inspired homes, everywhere.
